name: Fruited Smoked Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: Smoked turkey breast (2 1/2 cups, cut into strips)
recipeInstructions:
Cook Mostaccioli to desired doneness as directed on package. Drain and rinse with cold water.
To toast almonds, spread nuts on a baking sheet; bake at 350°F for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients except strawberries and nuts; toss.
In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine lemon juice (1/3 cup), oil (1/4 cup), honey (1/4 cup), and grated lemon peel (1/2 teaspoon); shake well. Pour over salad; toss to coat.
Cover; refrigerate 1-2 hours to blend flavors, stirring occasionally.
Just before serving, gently stir in strawberries and almonds.
